title: helianthella californica
intro: Helianthella californica, also known as California sunflower or California daisy, is a rare and endangered flowering plant native to the southwestern United States. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The medicinal properties of Helianthella californica are believed to provide various health benefits, including relief from colds, fever, and skin irritations, as well as supporting immune function and reducing inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and its seeds can also be used as a natural remedy for various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
